hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then export PATH="/Users/janbystriansky/node/bin:$PATH"; cd /Users/janbystriansky/IdeaProjects/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; fi
